dc_description: A wide rural landscape shows a dry, golden-brown harvested field stretching toward a dark green tree line on the horizon. Tall dry grasses and weeds occupy the shaded foreground, while the midground field is brightly lit by warm low-angle sunlight. The sky is pale blue and cloudless, with visible film-like grain across the image.
novel_visual_observations: The tree line forms a nearly continuous horizontal band across the upper third of the frame. A faint lighter track or strip runs from the central foreground area toward the middle distance of the field.
rich_context: Strada Monte Bianchetto, Nepi, Viterbo, Lazio, 01036, Italia
